creator: dim@FreeBSD.org
text:
Something that apparently got lost in the update from samba413 to samba416 is the patching of the /usr/local/etc/rc.d script to put in the right dependency, if you select something different from the default AVAHI zeroconf option, e.g. MDNSRESPONDER or NONE.

So /usr/local/etc/rc.d/samba_server has:

# REQUIRE: NETWORKING SERVERS DAEMON ldconfig resolv ntpd avahi_daemon

but in the port's net/samba416/files/samba_server.in this should be:

# REQUIRE: NETWORKING SERVERS DAEMON ldconfig resolv ntpd %%SAMBA4_SERVICES%%
